hero.subheadline: Cosmetic & digital dentistry with a personal touch — from Hollywood Smiles to advanced implants, crafted for you in the heart of Dubai.

services.title: World-Class Dental Services
services.subtitle: From Hollywood Smiles to advanced digital dentistry — every treatment is tailored to give you lasting results and a confident smile.

hollywoodSmile.title: Hollywood Smile
hollywoodSmile.description: Complete smile makeover combining veneers, whitening, and contouring for a naturally radiant, camera-ready smile.

veneers.title: Porcelain Veneers
veneers.description: Ultra-thin, custom-crafted porcelain shells that transform shape, color, and size — minimally invasive perfection.

whitening.title: Teeth Whitening
whitening.description: Professional whitening with the Beyond Brand device from the USA — up to 8 shades lighter in a single session.

digital.title: Digital Dentistry
digital.description: Precision treatments using the latest digital scanning, planning, and fabrication technology for unmatched accuracy.

smileDesign.title: Smile Design
smileDesign.description: Art meets science — a comprehensive digital simulation of your new smile before any treatment begins.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.description: Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements anchored to your jaw — restoring function and confidence.

why.title: Dentistry as an Art & Science
why.subtitle: A unique blend of technical excellence, artistic vision, and genuine care — setting new standards for dental experiences in Dubai.

insurance.title: All Insurance Accepted
insurance.description: We accept all major medical insurance plans, making quality dental care accessible for everyone.

installment.title: Flexible Installments
installment.description: Budget-friendly payment plans available — your perfect smile shouldn't have to wait.

digital.title: Digital Precision
digital.description: State-of-the-art digital dentistry tools ensure accuracy, comfort, and stunning results every time.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Care
multilingual.description: Consultations in English, Farsi, and Arabic — so you always feel heard and understood.

beforeAfter.title: Real Results, Real Smiles
beforeAfter.subtitle: See the life-changing transformations our patients experience at Dr. Lotfi's clinic.
beforeAfter.disclaimer: * Results may vary. Images shown with patient consent.

social.title: Dr. Lotfi on Social Media
social.subtitle: Behind the scenes of dentistry, travel, music, and life in Dubai — follow along on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.
social.noToken: Follow @drarefehlotfi on Instagram for the latest posts and smile transformations.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from real patients who trusted Dr. Lotfi with their smiles.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: Dr. Arefeh transformed my smile completely! The Hollywood Smile procedure was painless and the results are beyond what I imagined. I couldn't be happier.

items.name: Mohammed Al-Rashid
items.text: Flew in from Abu Dhabi specifically for Dr. Lotfi. The digital dentistry approach is impressive — she showed me the final result digitally before we even started. Professional and caring.

items.name: Anna K.
items.text: Travelled from Austria and completed 20 porcelain veneers in just 5 days. The clinic is beautiful, Dr. Lotfi is an artist, and my smile is absolutely stunning.

items.name: Fatima Hassan
items.text: The whitening session with the Beyond Brand device was incredible. 8 shades whiter in one session! Dr. Lotfi makes you feel so comfortable throughout.

team.title: Dr. Arefeh Lotfi
team.bio: Dr. Arefeh Lotfi is a Dubai-based cosmetic and digital dentist at Hoor Al Aliaa Dental Clinic, known for her artistic approach to smile design and passion for transforming lives through beautiful smiles. Beyond the clinic, she is a pianist, globetrotter, horse rider, and social media influencer — bringing the same creativity and precision to everything she does.
team.clinicAddress: Villa 943, Al Wasl Road, Umm Suqeim, Dubai

cta.title: Your Dream Smile Is One Appointment Away
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of happy patients who trusted Dr. Arefeh Lotfi with their smiles. Book your consultation today.
cta.insurance: All insurance accepted · Installment plans available

footer.address: Villa 943, Al Wasl Road, Al Manar, Umm Suqeim, Dubai

servicesPage.title: Complete Dental Care
servicesPage.subtitle: From a routine cleaning to a full smile makeover — every service is delivered with precision, care, and artistry.

insurance.title: Insurance & Payment
insurance.description: We accept all major medical insurance plans. Flexible installment payment options are also available — making your perfect smile truly accessible.

hollywoodSmile.title: Hollywood Smile
hollywoodSmile.description: A complete smile makeover combining porcelain veneers, whitening, and contouring. Digitally planned and precisely executed for a naturally perfect result.

veneers.title: Porcelain Veneers
veneers.description: Ultra-thin porcelain shells custom-crafted to your smile. Ideal for correcting shape, color, size, and alignment with minimal tooth reduction.

whitening.title: Teeth Whitening
whitening.description: Professional whitening using the Beyond Brand device from the USA — the gold standard for safe, effective, and lasting teeth whitening.

digital.title: Digital Dentistry
digital.description: Advanced digital scanning, digital smile design (DSD), and CAD/CAM fabrication for treatments that are precise, fast, and comfortable.

smileDesign.title: Smile Design
smileDesign.description: A detailed digital preview of your new smile before any treatment. You approve the final look — no surprises.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.description: Titanium implants that permanently replace missing teeth, looking and feeling like natural teeth. Built to last a lifetime.

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.description: Full range of cosmetic services including bonding, contouring, gum reshaping, and combination treatments for total smile enhancement.

emergency.title: Emergency Dental Care
emergency.description: Same-day appointments for dental emergencies — toothache, chipped teeth, lost crowns, and more. We're here when you need us most.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: A passion for beautiful smiles, backed by the latest digital technology and a genuine care for every patient.
aboutPage.storyText1: Dr. Arefeh Lotfi is a cosmetic and digital dentist practicing at Hoor Al Aliaa Dental Clinic in Umm Suqeim, Dubai. With a philosophy that dentistry is both an art and a science, she brings a creative, detail-oriented approach to every smile she designs.
aboutPage.storyText2: Known for her warm, multilingual consultations in English, Farsi, and Arabic, Dr. Lotfi has built a reputation as one of Dubai's most sought-after cosmetic dentists — treating patients who travel from across the UAE and internationally.
aboutPage.storyText3: Beyond the clinic, Dr. Lotfi is a pianist, world traveler, horse rider, and social media influencer — bringing the same creativity, precision, and passion to everything she does.

artistry.title: Artistry
artistry.description: Every smile is a unique canvas. We combine aesthetics with science for results that look completely natural.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Digital Smile Design and CAD/CAM technology mean we plan perfectly before we treat.

care.title: Genuine Care
care.description: We listen first. Your goals, your concerns, your comfort — always the priority.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: All insurance accepted and flexible installments available so everyone can access quality dental care.

aboutPage.clinicAddress: Villa 943, Al Wasl Road, Al Manar, Umm Suqeim, Dubai

galleryPage.subtitle: A showcase of real results — before and after, smile designs, and clinic highlights.
